parameters.content:
## Delete Orphan Profiles — server-side TTL sweep

Hourly: lists ALL Wappi profiles (WhatsApp api/ + Telegram tapi/), tracks unauthorized ones in a first-seen ledger (workflow staticData — Wappi exposes no creation timestamp), and deletes profiles that stay unauthorized for the full TTL, re-checking get/status right before each delete.

NEVER deletes: authorized profiles, deleted_at-set profiles, ambiguous authorized flags, profiles tracked < TTL, or profiles with authorized_at/logouted_at inside the TTL window.

Covers the leaks the client cannot: swipe-kill / iOS quit mid-wizard, and profile/add responses that never reached the app. Client twin: PendingProfileLedger (quit-time settle + next-launch sweep).

Sweep Config: ttlHours (24) / dryRun — dryRun reports wouldDelete without deleting.
